advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What is the purpose of communicating with the Lenovo Framework APP during the firmware update process?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that communication with the Lenovo Framework APP is necessary to ensure the update tool can interact with the app smoothly during the firmware update process.

questions.question: What information is set in the INI file for the firmware update?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions that the update tool needs to set various parameters in the INI file, including but not limited to checking the legality of the software or scaler firmware, but it does not provide a complete list of all the parameters.

questions.question: What is the purpose of using the PostMessage method to send messages?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the update tool needs to use the PostMessage method to send update messages to the Lenovo Framework APP, ensuring the app can receive the update status in a timely manner.
